launch_authorization.scope: Prep-only dual public PDB/EMDB structure jury. Paid launch requires operator substitution and closeout.

safety.license_policy: open tooling only; no CryoSPARC/Phenix/ChimeraX or other gated tools
safety.private_data_policy: public PDB/EMDB only; no private data
safety.raw_data_policy: no raw movies or particle stacks

commands: mkdir -p runpod-execution/logs runpod-execution/artifacts && { nohup python3 -m http.server "${RUNPOD_HTTP_ARTIFACT_SERVER_PORT:-8000}" --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory runpod-execution/artifacts >> runpod-execution/logs/live-http.log 2>&1 </dev/null & echo $! > runpod-execution/live-http.pid; disown "$(cat runpod-execution/live-http.pid)" 2>/dev/null || true; }

mkdir -p scripts/cryocore runpod-execution/artifacts
python3 - <<'PY'
import base64
import io
import tarfile
from pathlib import Path

root = Path(".").resolve()
payload = ''
with tarfile.open(fileobj=io.BytesIO(base64.b64decode(payload)), mode="r:gz") as archive:
    for member in archive.getmembers():
        target = (root / member.name).resolve()
        try:
            target.relative_to(root)
        except ValueError:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Unsafe bundle member: {member.name}")
        if member.issym() or member.islnk() or member.isdev() or not member.isfile():
            raise RuntimeError(f"Unsupported bundle member: {member.name}")
        source = archive.extractfile(member)
        if source is None:
            raise RuntimeError(f"Unreadable bundle member: {member.name}")
        target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        target.write_bytes(source.read())
PY
python3 scripts/cryocore/structure_jury_dossier.py --out runpod-execution --json | tee runpod-execution/artifacts/campaign-summary.stdout.json

validation_commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('runpod-execution')
base = root / 'artifacts'
status = json.loads((root / 'status.json').read_text())
summary = json.loads((base / 'campaign-summary.json').read_text())
contract = json.loads((base / 'validation' / 'contract-self-check.json').read_text())
manifest = json.loads((base / 'dossier_manifest.json').read_text())
ledger = json.loads((base / 'data-intake-ledger.json').read_text())
assert status['ok'] is True
assert summary['ok'] is True
assert summary['target_count'] == 2
assert contract['ok'] is True, contract['errors']
assert manifest['raw_data_downloaded'] is False
assert manifest['license_gated_tools_used'] == []
assert ledger['raw_movies_downloaded'] is False
for rel in ['report.html', 'report.md', 'figures/evidence-matrix.svg', 'figures/maturity-ladder.svg', 'targets/t2r14/artifacts/report.html', 'targets/poltheta/artifacts/report.html', 'targets/poltheta/artifacts/validation/map_model_fit.json', 'runpod-execution.tar.gz']:
    assert (base / rel).is_file(), rel
PY

workload.description: Two-target public deposited-structure jury for T2R14 and pol theta

inputs: PDB 9W0Q public mmCIF and RCSB metadata
stage_contract.resume_policy: Disposable demo pod. If interrupted, delete pod and relaunch the same manifest; public-data outputs are deterministic enough for demo comparison.

claim_boundaries: runpod-execution/artifacts/claim_ledger.md must include insufficient_evidence boundaries for final mechanism and publication-ready validation
campaign claim level remains candidate for deposited public-data dossier evidence; raw reconstruction and licensed-tool refinement are out of scope
input_materialization: runpod-execution/artifacts/data-intake-ledger.json joins PDB 9W0Q, PDB 9ASJ, EMDB EMD-43816, and wwPDB validation XML materialized files with bytes and sha256
runpod-execution/artifacts/validation/input-audit.json records no missing operator items before target dossier execution
tool_invocation: runpod-execution/artifacts/executed-commands.jsonl records campaign_input_audit, t2r14_dossier, poltheta_dossier, campaign_join, claim_audit, and archive stages
